name: gate-typo-classifies-as-not-registered
description: The contract references `useGeoLocation` (capital L) under `@ggui-ai/gadgets` — a near-miss typo of the registered `useGeolocation`. A typo'd export name is still an export name absent from every registered package, so the gate MUST classify it as `gadget_not_registered`, NOT `gadget_package_mismatch` (the name does not resolve under any package). The reference gate additionally attaches a did-you-mean suggestion when a registered name is within Levenshtein distance < 3; the suggestion is a message-level aid and does not change the outcome code this catalog asserts.
